items.headline: Leaked contract shows Flock Safety license-plate cameras feeding a live ICE lookup pipeline in 40 cities
items.why: Primary-source contract + named villain + surveillance that ends in real-world enforcement.

items.headline: Court filing reveals DHS bought location data on 250M phones without warrants, used it for raids
items.why: Court document exposes a hidden, deployed system affecting a universal pool.

items.headline: Clearview AI now holds 60 billion face scans; new docs show it scraped a major social platform's private photos
items.why: Named villain, broad pool, deployed system — strong but no direct enforcement bridge yet.

items.headline: FOIA release: TSA expanded facial recognition to 80 more airports, opt-out quietly removed
items.why: FOIA disclosure of a real expansion; pool is broad but not quite universal.

items.headline: New study finds consumer car app shares precise driving data with 12 brokers by default
items.why: Trojan-horse data flow, broad pool, but no named Tier-S agency on the receiving end.
